zh-TW.title: Founding and Early History
zh-TW.desc: How Laguna Beach grew from an indigenous homeland to an artists colony to an incorporated city.

zh-TW.title: The 1993 Firestorm
zh-TW.desc: A wildfire that destroyed 441 homes in Laguna Beach on October 27, 1993, reshaping the city's relationship with fire and development.

zh-TW.title: The Cliff Restaurant
zh-TW.desc: A landmark oceanfront restaurant perched on the bluffs above the Pacific, serving Laguna Beach since 1946.
